response.global_analysis:
1. JSON Match: The vocal performance matches the song 'Silent Flame, Never Fade' with Japanese lyrics.
2. JSON Usage: The lyrics reference provided English translations which were fully adapted, while the Japanese lyrics and the outro speech were manually transcribed and translated.
3. Timing & Pacing: Timings are strictly anchored to the vocal starts, keeping up with the fast-paced song by splitting long sentences cleanly. The outro section was carefully transcribed to match Shiranui Flare's spoken words and the on-screen text.

subtitles.original: いくつもの夜を越えて
subtitles.english: Crossing many nights,

subtitles.original: 紡いできた　自分らしさ
subtitles.english: I have spun my own way.

subtitles.original: 選択したそのすべてが
subtitles.english: All the choices I made

subtitles.original: 私をまた突き動かす
subtitles.english: stir me into motion again.

subtitles.original: 強がってた訳じゃなくて
subtitles.english: It wasn't that I was trying to be strong,

subtitles.original: 止まることが怖かったよ
subtitles.english: I was just afraid to stop.

subtitles.original: 迷いながら選んだあの日もきっと
subtitles.english: That day I was lost, surely,

subtitles.original: 今のチカラになってるよ
subtitles.english: is becoming my strength now.

subtitles.original: 一人きりだと思っても
subtitles.english: Even when I thought I was all alone,

subtitles.original: 気づけばそこにある笑顔が
subtitles.english: if I realized it, the smile there

subtitles.original: 私といつも一緒に
subtitles.english: was always...

subtitles.original: 歩いてくれてた
subtitles.english: ...walking by my side.

subtitles.original: その意味　そのチカラ
subtitles.english: That meaning, that strength,

subtitles.original: 絶対に離さない！
subtitles.english: I will never let go!

subtitles.original: 加速していくこの想いは
subtitles.english: This emotion that keeps accelerating

subtitles.original: いま翼を纏い出す
subtitles.english: is now starting to put on wings.

subtitles.original: 私が私でいれる
subtitles.english: That I can be myself

subtitles.original: それだけで十分だから
subtitles.english: is enough, so...

subtitles.original: 逃げないって決めたのは
subtitles.english: The reason I decided not to run away

subtitles.original: 強くなったからじゃない
subtitles.english: is not because I became strong.

subtitles.original: 私を呼ぶその声と
subtitles.english: With that voice calling me,

subtitles.original: 重ね合った
subtitles.english: overlapping with mine,

subtitles.original: 信じる世界の明日を
subtitles.english: I believe in the tomorrow of this world.

subtitles.original: 傷つくこと躊躇ってた（ためらってた）
subtitles.english: I hesitated to get hurt,

subtitles.original: 立ち止まったこともあった
subtitles.english: there were times I stood still.

subtitles.original: そんな時にこの背中を
subtitles.english: At such times, the gaze

subtitles.original: 押してくれたその眼差し
subtitles.english: that pushed my back...

subtitles.original: 迷いながら選んだ道（みち）
subtitles.english: The path I chose while wandering,

subtitles.original: 間違いさえ真実だと
subtitles.english: even mistakes are the truth.

subtitles.original: その焔は闇を照らして（てらして）
subtitles.english: That flame lit up the darkness

subtitles.original: 私に正しさをくれた（くれた）
subtitles.english: and gave me the path of right.

subtitles.original: 張り裂けそうに痛んでも
subtitles.english: Even when it hurts so much it feels like tearing,

subtitles.original: この胸に刻んだ勇気が
subtitles.english: the courage carved in my heart...

subtitles.original: 私をいつも
subtitles.english: was always...

subtitles.original: 支えてくれていたから
subtitles.english: ...supporting me, so...

subtitles.original: 今ここに感じ合う（かんじあう）
subtitles.english: Now we feel each other here,

subtitles.original: あなたと私の夢
subtitles.english: your dream and mine.

subtitles.original: 燃え尽きることの無い夢は（ゆめは）
subtitles.english: The dream that will never burn out,

subtitles.original: この大空に羽ばたいて（はばたいて）
subtitles.english: spreads its wings into this vast sky.

subtitles.original: 涙さえも輝かせ（かがやかせ）
subtitles.english: Making even tears shine,

subtitles.original: 誰かの夜を照らしたい（てらしたい）
subtitles.english: I want to light up someone's night.

subtitles.original: 逃げないって決めたのは（きめたのは）
subtitles.english: The reason I decided not to run away

subtitles.original: 強くなったからじゃない（じゃない）
subtitles.english: is not because I became strong.

subtitles.original: 静かな焔を抱いて（だいて）
subtitles.english: Embracing a quiet flame,

subtitles.original: 何度だって（なんどだって）
subtitles.english: again and again,

subtitles.original: 立ち上がること知ったから（しったから）
subtitles.english: because I learned I can rise once more.

subtitles.original: たとえ世界が色を失くし（うしない）
subtitles.english: Even if the world loses its color

subtitles.original: 光が遠ざかっても（とおざかっても）
subtitles.english: and the light fades away,

subtitles.original: この名に刻む焔は（ほのおは）
subtitles.english: the flame engraved in this name

subtitles.original: あなたと私を繋いで（つないで）
subtitles.english: will connect you and me.
